headline: OREO CAKESTERS Debuts "The Soft Life," a Nationwide ASMR Pop-Up That Engages the Senses
summary: This summer, OREO CAKESTERS is inviting fans to experience the softer* side of snacking as it launches "The Soft Life" Pop-Up: An OREO CAKESTERS Brand Experience and nationwide tour. Designed to bring the treat to life through the senses, the free, public pop-up experience completely immerses OREO cookie lovers in the pillowy world of the brand's softest OREO CAKESTERS recipe yet*.
